title: Loan Underwriting: What is the main consideration when determining the appropriate loan...
summary: Identify key considerations in selecting the appropriate loan structure.
prompt: What is the main consideration when determining the appropriate loan structure for a real estate investment?

options.text: Measures ability to meet short-term obligations
When determining the appropriate loan structure for a real estate investment,

solution: When determining the appropriate loan structure for a real estate investment, several factors must be considered, including interest rates, which affect overall financing costs; Loan-to-Value (LTV) ratios, which assess the proportion of debt to property value; and Debt Service Coverage Ratios (DSCR), which evaluate a property’s ability to cover its debt obligations. Each of these elements plays a critical role in structuring a financially sound investment.
